idea-plugin.name: Project Stats
idea-plugin.description:
Visualize where your project's source code size comes from.
Breaks down lines of code, code-only LOC and cyclomatic complexity by language, module, source category (source/test/resources/generated), or directory tree with a treemap, GitHub-style stacked bar, and sortable table. Drill into directories with a single click — empty single-child folder chains collapse automatically.
Cyclomatic complexity uses IntelliJ PSI for every language with a PSI tree (Java, Kotlin, Groovy, Python, JS/TS, PHP, Go, Ruby, Rust, Scala, Dart, …) and falls back to keyword counting for plain-text files.
